# CoachFlow

> Multi-tenant WhatsApp coaching platform

SignOutButton: Provides SignOutButton.
page: Provides AnalyticsPage.
page: Provides JourneyDetailsPage.
JourneysClientPage: Provides JourneysClientPage.
page: Provides JourneysPage.
layout: Provides AdminLayout.
page: Provides DashboardPage.
page: Provides PromptsPage.
TenantsClientPage: Provides TenantsClientPage.
page: Provides TenantsPage.
page: Provides UserProgressPage.
page: Provides UsersPage.
layout: Provides RootLayout.
page: Provides LoginPage.
api: Provides apiFetch.
client: Provides createClient.
server: Provides createClient.
geminiClient: Provides generate.
coaching:
reflection:
roleplay:
scoring:
system:
journeyLoader.test:
analytics: Provides getCompletionRates, getStepFunnel, getScoreDistribution.
journeyLoader: Provides listJourneys, getJourney, createJourney, updateJourney, deleteJourney, getStep.
journeySteps: Provides createStep, updateStep, deleteStep, reorderSteps.
journeys: Provides ensureUserJourney, advanceUserJourney, completeUserJourney.
scores: Provides saveScore, getScoresForUser.
sessions: Provides startSession, endSession, logMessage, getSessionMessages.
supabaseClient: Provides supabase.
tenants: Provides getTenantByPhoneNumberId, getTenantWhatsAppToken, getTenantPromptOverrides, listTenants, createTenant, getTenantById, updateTenant, setTenantWhatsAppToken, upsertTenantPrompt, deleteTenantPrompt.
users: Provides upsertUser, updateUserProgress, markOnboarded, claimMessage, getUserByNumber, searchUsers, getUserProgress.
contextBuilder.test:
flowRouter.test:
outputParser.test:
sessionManager.test:
sessionStore.contract.test:
contextBuilder: Provides trimHistory, transcript.
flowRouter: Provides handleInbound.
inMemorySessionStore: Defines InMemorySessionStore.
outputParser: Provides parseAIResponse.
redisSessionStore: Defines RedisSessionStore.
sessionManager: Provides configureSessionStore, getSession, createSession, updateSession, appendTurn, resetSession, deleteSession, activeSessionCount, startSessionSweeper, stopSessionSweeper.
sessionStore:
index:
auth: Provides requireAuth, requireRole.
parser.test:
parser: Provides parseWebhook.
sender: Provides sendTextMessage, sendButtonMessage, sendListMessage, markAsRead.
types:
webhook: Provides verifyWebhook, verifySignature, receiveWebhook.
index:
sessionStore.contract: Provides sessionStoreContract.
index:
index:
index:
